Name: CreditManagementScenario
Description: Default credit management scenario to be used for new payment terms

Name: DiscountCalculation
Description: Indicates how the discount amount is calculated. Values: E = Excluding VAT, I = Including VAT

Name: DiscountPaymentDays
Description: Number of days to pay within, to have the right to take the discount

Name: PaymentDays
Description: Number of days to be included in the due date calculation. Example: invoice date = 17/01 PaymentEndOfMonths = 2 => 31/03 PaymentDays = 15 => 15/04

Name: PaymentDiscountType
Description: Type of payment discount. Values: B = Settlement discount, K = Credit surcharge

Name: PaymentEndOfMonths
Description: Number of month endings to be included in the due date calculation

Name: PaymentMethod
Description: Method of payment. Values: B = On credit, I = Collection, K = Cash, Q = PSP Collection

Name: Percentage
Description: Percentage (stored as fraction) of total invoice amount

Name: VATCalculation
Description: Indicates how the VAT amount is calculated Values: E = Excluding discount, I = Including discount
